g.text: One canonical library (lib/TeensySos), two thin CLI composition roots
Two thin roots, one per command-line frontend.
Each owns the concrete adapters and wires them
into the controller (setup() = bring-up, loop() = poll()).
Owns the timed SOS program, steps it
the LED. Depends only on ports + Domain.
build_sos() expands S-O-S into a flat,
Available starter component - NOT used by
the trivial SOS demo.** Real firmware built
from this template reaches for it.
